findings.description: The sample data (SW-1 through SW-5 results and risk assessments) appears both within the embedded map image and as separate HTML tables, duplicating the same content in two renderings.
findings.evidence:
The main map contains all five sample callout boxes with parameter values and risk assessments. The HTML also renders each of these as standalone elements (captions: SW-1/DUP-6102025-SD, SW-2, SW-3, SW-4, SW-5). Per C7 MUST FLAG: 'a table rendered both as a screenshot and as a parallel
'.

findings.description: Multiple small images from the PDF (likely legend symbols or map icons) are included in the HTML with empty alt text, providing no informational value.
